scope: first three planning tasks from the pinned corpus
notes: This is a real measured pilot slice, not the final benchmark run artifact.
Time measurements come from local CLI command timing in the clean baseline worktree.
orientation_tokens_before_first_edit and full trustworthiness scoring are not captured here because this pilot did not run through a live agent-session token counter.
Use this pilot to calibrate adjudication before filling results/baseline.json.

baseline_flow: node dist/cli/index.js query "Split repo state evaluation away from runtime coordination in repo-manager" --owners
notes: The initial query already surfaced the two gold edit surfaces.
A follow-up context call was still needed to understand call edges and blast radius.

baseline_flow: node dist/cli/index.js query "Reduce authority concentration in Local Backend ranking and graph recovery" --owners
notes: The baseline query found the ranking owner but did not surface the paired graph-recovery owner required by the corpus gold.
This task would require additional exploration beyond the initial baseline command chain.

baseline_flow: node dist/cli/index.js query "Reduce truth-family concentration around call resolution in ingestion" --owners
notes: The baseline query anchored correctly on call-processor but missed the symbol-table companion surface that the task gold requires.
The task would need at least one more exploration step before planning could be considered complete.
